requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is Client CEO responsible for vision, business decisions, and final approvals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is Client PM responsible for operational requirements, integrations, and technical decisions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is BA responsible for requirements elicitation and documentation.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is PM responsible for project delivery, integration planning, and timeline management.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: End customers browse, search, and purchase products on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Store managers view regional orders and manage returns via the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Central admin team manages products, pricing, and promotions across the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Vendor partners manage their own inventory and product listings via dedicated login.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must go live within 6 months maximum from project start.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is deployed and accessible to customers within 6 months.

requirements.description: System must support credit card payments for customer purchases.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully complete purchase using a credit card.

requirements.description: System must support credit card EMI payment option at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select credit card EMI and complete order successfully.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Bajaj Finance API for no-cost EMI financing.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select Bajaj Finance no-cost EMI and receive financing approval.

requirements.description: Bajaj Finance API integration is feasible given existing client agreement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: ZestMoney partnership agreement will be finalized before platform go-live.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must provide separate login portal for vendor partners to manage listings.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in and access only their own product and inventory data.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage their product information and inventory via portal.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can update product details and stock levels successfully.

requirements.description: Vendors cannot set product prices; only central admin controls all pricing.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor portal has no price editing capability.

requirements.description: Store managers must view orders filtered by their geographic region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager sees only orders associated with their assigned region.

requirements.description: Store managers must be able to manage customer returns from their region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can initiate and process a return for a regional order.

requirements.description: System must support a product catalog of up to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform successfully loads and displays 25,000 SKUs without degradation.

requirements.description: System must integrate with SAP ERP to migrate and sync product data.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product data from SAP is successfully imported into the platform.

requirements.description: Inventory levels must sync with SAP ERP in real time.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Stock update in SAP reflects on platform within 60 seconds.

requirements.description: Product information must sync from SAP via daily batch process.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product information batch sync completes successfully once per day.

requirements.description: Products sold out in physical stores must not display as available online.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock product shows unavailable status within real-time sync window.

requirements.description: System must provide product search by product name, category, and brand.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results for name, category, and brand queries.

requirements.description: System must support product filtering by price range, brand, ratings, and delivery time.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Applying each filter type returns correctly filtered product results.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to submit product reviews and ratings.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a review and rating for a purchased product.

requirements.description: Admin must moderate and approve customer reviews before they are published.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Review is not visible to customers until admin approves it.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to add products to a wishlist for later purchase.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to wishlist and retrieve it in a later session.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Delhivery API for shipping rates and order tracking.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rate from Delhivery is displayed at checkout and tracking is available post-order.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to track their orders in real time within the platform.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live shipment status on their order detail page.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with GDPR regulations for NRI customer data handling.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform passes GDPR compliance audit for data collection and consent.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with Indian IT Act regulations.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform meets all applicable Indian IT Act requirements.

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored on servers physically located within India.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Infrastructure audit confirms no customer data stored outside India.

requirements.description: Platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users during peak sale events.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load test confirms platform stable at 50,000 concurrent users.

requirements.description: All platform pages must load within 3 seconds under normal and peak conditions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Performance test shows 95th percentile page load time under 3 seconds.

requirements.description: System must generate sales reports on daily, weekly, and monthly intervals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export sales reports for each time period.

requirements.description: Sales reports must be filterable by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Report filtered by region, category, or vendor returns accurate segmented data.

requirements.description: System must provide cart abandonment analytics showing viewed-but-not-purchased products.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Analytics dashboard displays cart abandonment rate and associated products.

requirements.description: System must support sending promotional emails and SMS to customers.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can trigger a promotional email and SMS campaign to a customer segment.

requirements.description: Existing 8,000 SAP SKU data is clean and suitable for direct migration.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: RetailCorp will provide SAP API credentials and access for integration development.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Delhivery and BlueDart APIs are publicly available and accessible for integration.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: 50,000 peak users is based on physical store footfall and may underestimate online traffic.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must be scalable to accommodate catalog growth from 8,000 to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: System performance remains within SLA after catalog expansion to 25,000 SKUs.

requirements.description: Platform must support high availability during peak sale events such as Diwali.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform maintains uptime during simulated Diwali-scale load test.

requirements.description: Client has existing SAP ERP system that must be integrated rather than replaced.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Average order value is approximately INR 15,000; EMI options are critical for high-value items.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: System must support an auth module with role-based access for customers, store managers, admins, and vendors.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Each user role can only access features and data permitted for their role.

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using email or mobile number.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully register with a valid email or mobile number and receive confirmation.

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in via email/password or OTP.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in successfully using either email/password or a valid OTP.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search products by name, brand, or category.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name, brand, or category.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price, brand, rating, and delivery time.
acceptance_criteria: Applying any filter updates search results to show only matching products.

requirements.description: The system shall display detailed product information including images, specs, price, and reviews.
acceptance_criteria: Product detail page shows images, description, specifications, price, and customer reviews.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart.
acceptance_criteria: Selected products appear in the cart with correct quantities and prices.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to save products to a personal wishlist for later purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to wishlist and retrieve it in a subsequent session.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add and select a delivery address during checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can save a new address and select it as the delivery address before placing an order.

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete a purchase using each of the five supported payment methods.

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking after purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live shipment status and estimated delivery time for a placed order.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who purchased a product to submit a review and rating.
acceptance_criteria: Only verified purchasers can submit a rating and text review for a product.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to approve or reject customer reviews before publication.
acceptance_criteria: A review is only visible to customers after an admin explicitly approves it.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a new product, update its details, and deactivate it so it no longer appears to customers.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to set and update product prices and discounts.
acceptance_criteria: Updated price or discount is reflected on the product page immediately after admin saves changes.

requirements.description: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time to reflect accurate stock availability.
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock products are marked unavailable on the platform within 60 seconds of SAP inventory update.

requirements.description: The system shall allow vendors to manage their own product listings on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can create, update, and remove their product listings via the vendor portal.

requirements.description: The system shall allow store managers to view all orders placed within their region.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays all regional orders with status, customer, and delivery details.

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export a sales report for any supported time period, category, region, or vendor combination.

requirements.description: The system shall report products added to cart but not purchased to central admins.
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard shows an abandoned-cart report listing products and abandonment counts for a selected period.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a campaign, select target audience, and successfully dispatch it via email and SMS channels.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional mobile application for Android and iOS devices.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can browse, search, and complete a purchase end-to-end on both Android and iOS mobile apps.

requirements.description: The system shall display key business metrics to executives via a mobile dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Executive mobile dashboard shows real-time KPIs including revenue, orders, and top-performing products.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a return request with reason for a delivered order and receive a confirmation with next steps.

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart APIs for automated shipping rate calculation and order tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Shipping cost is auto-calculated at checkout and live tracking data is retrieved from Delhivery and BlueDart APIs.

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India Pvt. Ltd. to enable online retail operations
glossary.RetailCorp: The client organization, a mid-size Indian retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores selling home appliances, electronics, and furniture
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit; a unique identifier for each distinct product in the catalog, with current SAP inventory at 8,000 and target platform capacity of 25,000
glossary.EMI: Equated Monthly Installment; a payment option allowing customers to split high-value purchases into monthly payments, offered via credit card EMI and no-cost EMI through financing partners
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An EMI arrangement where the interest cost is absorbed by the retailer or financing partner, making it free to the customer; provided via Bajaj Finance and ZestMoney
glossary.Bajaj Finance: A third-party financing partner whose API will be integrated to provide no-cost EMI options at checkout
glossary.ZestMoney: A third-party buy-now-pay-later financing partner whose partnership agreement is pending finalization before go-live
glossary.SAP ERP: RetailCorp's existing enterprise resource planning system used for product data and inventory management, which must be integrated rather than replaced
glossary.Delhivery: A logistics partner whose API will be integrated for shipping rate calculation and real-time order tracking
glossary.Vendor Portal: A dedicated login interface allowing vendor partners to manage their own product listings and inventory, with pricing controlled exclusively by central admin
glossary.Role-Based Access Control: An authentication and authorization model restricting platform features by user role, covering customers, store managers, central admins, and vendor partners
glossary.Cart Abandonment Analytics: A reporting feature tracking products that customers viewed or added to cart but did not purchase, used for marketing optimization
glossary.Peak Sale Event: High-traffic promotional periods such as Diwali during which the platform must sustain 50,000 concurrent users and maintain sub-3-second page load times
glossary.NRI: Non-Resident Indian; customers outside India whose data handling must comply with GDPR regulations in addition to the Indian IT Act
